raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A black bowl sits on a wooden table. The bowl is rigid with a curved rim. STRATEGY - reach the bowl at its rim for a stable grasp, lift it, and transport it to the blue container. Failure modes include dropping the bowl or misaligning it with the container. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach bowl rim; Step 2 grasp rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport above container; Step 4 lower into container.**
Goal: inside(black_bowl, blue_container)
Scene: black_bowl, blue_container, table
Step 1: reach(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, black_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, black_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
  contact: holding(black_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(black_bowl)
Step 3: transport(black_bowl -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  spatial: above(black_bowl, blue_container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(black_bowl)
  done_when: above(black_bowl, blue_container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(black_bowl -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  contact: surface_contact(black_bowl, blue_container) [completion]; released(black_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(black_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(black_bowl, blue_container) AND released(black_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
the rim of the black bowl
an empty area inside the blue container
an empty area inside the blue container
